C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\mips_display.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\mips_display.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\mips_display.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -shared -o libmips_display.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libmips_display.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\mips_display.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\mips_display.dir\linkLibs.rsp
